scripts.dev:server: bash -lc 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use >/dev/null && npm run dev --workspace server'
scripts.dev:web: bash -lc 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use >/dev/null && npm run dev --workspace web'
scripts.init:test-users: bash -lc 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use >/dev/null && npm run init:test-users --workspace server'
scripts.build: bash -lc 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use >/dev/null && npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace web'
